title: 32 Sheet Disappearing Note Pad Dissolving Message Notebook Paper - Spy Journal
description:
The Disappearing Paper Dissolving Notebook Journal looks like an ordinary paper journal; but add water and it will dissolve into a paper mulch that can not be reconstructed or viewed by prying human eyes and it leaves no digital DNA to put back together! You can write on this paper normally, but as soon as it comes into contact with liquid (even saliva) it will transform into a secure mulch. This makes it ideal for those confidential notes that may need to "disappear" quickly with little advance notice!
